summary: Temporary project smoke confirms opennori init --confirm creates .opennori state and returns agent_next.state initialized_no_active_contract; subsequent doctor is ready with zero active goals and routes to nori-acceptance. This makes empty .opennori directories understandable to agents and users without relying on agent-guide discovery.
reviewability: Rerun the temporary-project command and confirm agent_next.state is initialized_no_active_contract with recommended_skill nori-acceptance.
limitations: The smoke uses local source checkout; npm users require the next published package to get the same behavior.
